questions.text: You are preparing for Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect Expert and reviewing Design identity, governance, and monitoring. Which source aligns with official Microsoft Learn and Azure documentation?

questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to design multi-subscription governance. Which solution is BEST?
questions.explanation: Landing zones standardize platform foundations.

questions.text: The DevOps team is automating releases and must globally distributed NoSQL. Which design fits best?
questions.explanation: Cosmos DB offers global distribution and SLAs.

questions.text: A hybrid environment must support a goal to enforce guardrails on new subscriptions without changing application code. What should you implement?
questions.explanation: Initiatives group related policies.

questions.text: While troubleshooting latency, engineers determine they must design directory groups for RBAC. Which action is appropriate?

options.text: Microsoft Entra groups with role assignments

questions.explanation: Groups simplify access management.

questions.text: A company needs to Layer 7 load balancing for web apps. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort?
questions.explanation: App Gateway provides WAF and routing.

questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to ingress TLS with Web Application Firewall. Which approach is MOST reliable?
questions.explanation: WAF protects web apps at edge.

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would Layer 7 load balancing for web apps. Design B would ingress TLS with Web Application Firewall. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would ingress TLS with Web Application Firewall. Design B would private cluster API for Kubernetes. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: WAF protects web apps at edge. Compare with Private AKS clusters: Private clusters limit API exposure.
